tool_args.label: Penn Station Access Program - Contract Awards
tool_args.raw_text: Approved the award of a publicly advertised and competitively solicited contract (CBX-001) for design-build services for the Metro-North Railroad Penn Station Access Project to Halmar International, LLC/RailWorks, Joint Venture in the amount of $1,850,643,000 and a duration of sixty-three (63) months. Approved the award of a publicly advertised and competitively solicited contract (PS21008) for the Metro-North Railroad Penn Station Access Project to WSP USA Inc. and Atlas ATC Engineering Inc., Joint Venture for eighty-six (86) months in the not-to-exceed amount of $116,572,815.

payload.project_name: Metro-North Railroad Penn Station Access Project
payload.description: Design-build contract (CBX-001) awarded to Halmar International, LLC/RailWorks Joint Venture for $1,850,643,000 over 63 months, and contract (PS21008) awarded to WSP USA Inc. and Atlas ATC Engineering Inc. Joint Venture for $116,572,815 over 86 months

evidence_refs.source_quote: Approved the award of a publicly advertised and competitively solicited contract (CBX-001) for design-build services for the Metro-North Railroad Penn Station Access Project to Halmar International, LLC/RailWorks, Joint Venture ... in the amount of $1,850,643,000 and a duration of sixty-three (63) months. 2. Approved the award of ... (PS21008) for the Metro-North Railroad Penn Station Access Project to WSP USA Inc. and Atlas ATC Engineering Inc., Joint Venture for eighty-six (86) months in the not-to-exceed amount of $116,572,815

tool_args.label: Second Avenue Subway Phase 2 - Relocation Services Contract
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Construction & Development requests Board approval to award a publicly advertised and competitively solicited contract for real estate relocation services for Phase 2 of the Second Avenue Subway Project and other projects to O.R. Colan Associates, LLC for seventy-two (72) months in the not-to-exceed amount of $11,052,964.

payload.description: Contract C81439 awarded to O.R. Colan Associates, LLC for real estate relocation services for SAS Phase 2 (extending from 96th Street to 125th Street in Manhattan) and additional projects. Not-to-exceed $11,052,964 over 72 months. $5,792,205 for SAS-2, $5,260,759 for additional projects via Task Orders.

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA Construction & Development ("C&D") requests Board approval to award a publicly advertised and competitively solicited contract for real estate relocation services for Phase 2 of the Second Avenue Subway Project ("SAS-2") and other projects to O.R. Colan Associates, LLC ... for seventy-two (72) months in the not-to-exceed amount of $11,052,964
This project will involve extending the SAS-2 from 96th Street to 125th Street in Manhattan

tool_args.label: Penn Station Access Program - Contract Awards
tool_args.raw_text: Approved the award of a publicly advertised and competitively solicited contract (CBX-001) for design-build services for the Metro-North Railroad Penn Station Access Project to Halmar International, LLC/RailWorks, Joint Venture.

payload.project_name: Metro-North Railroad Penn Station Access Project
payload.description: Board approved two contracts: (1) CBX-001 to Halmar International/RailWorks JV for $1,850,643,000 design-build over 63 months; (2) PS21008 to WSP USA/Atlas ATC Engineering JV for $116,572,815 over 86 months

evidence_refs.source_quote: 1. Approved the award of a publicly advertised and competitively solicited contract (CBX-001) for design-build services for the Metro-North Railroad Penn Station Access Project to Halmar International, LLC/RailWorks, Joint Venture (a joint venture consisting of Halmar International, LLC and RailWorks Transit Inc.) in the amount of $1,850,643,000 and a duration of sixty-three (63) months. 2. Approved the award of a publicly advertised and competitively solicited contract (PS21008) for the Metro-North Railroad Penn Station Access Project to WSP USA Inc. and Atlas ATC Engineering Inc., Joint Venture for eighty-six (86) months in the not-to-exceed amount of $116,572,815.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: Second Avenue Subway Phase 2 - Relocation Services Contract
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Construction & Development requests Board approval to award a publicly advertised and competitively solicited contract for real estate relocation services for Phase 2 of the Second Avenue Subway Project.

payload.description: Contract C81439 to O.R. Colan Associates, LLC for 72 months at $11,052,964 (not-to-exceed). $5,792,205 for SAS-2; $5,260,759 for additional projects via Task Orders. Extends SAS-2 from 96th Street to 125th Street in Manhattan.

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA Construction & Development ("C&D") requests Board approval to award a publicly advertised and competitively solicited contract for real estate relocation services for Phase 2 of the Second Avenue Subway Project ("SAS-2") and other projects to O.R. Colan Associates, LLC ("O.R. Colan") for seventy-two (72) months in the not-to-exceed amount of $11,052,964.
This project will involve extending the SAS-2 from 96th Street to 125th Street in Manhattan.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer
